tasks.title: Scaffold cli/commands/image/ package
tasks.acceptance: Directory layout created, registerImageCommand exported from index.ts, registered in cli/cli.ts. `oma image --help` shows placeholder subcommands.

tasks.title: types.ts + registry.ts (VendorProvider interface + parallel health)
tasks.acceptance: VendorProvider interface per design §3.1. registry.register/list/listHealthy work. Unit test registers dummy provider and confirms health() dispatch.

tasks.title: Config loader (image-config.yaml + env var override)
tasks.acceptance: YAML parsed, env precedence config<env<flag. Schema validation rejects invalid values. .agents/skills/oma-image/config/image-config.yaml created with defaults.

tasks.title: Naming utility + manifest writer
tasks.acceptance: timestamp+nanoid(6) suffix pattern. writeManifest() writes manifest.json matching schema §6 of design doc. Unit test with mocked Date+nanoid.

tasks.title: Path validation + --allow-external-out guard
tasks.acceptance: Canonicalize --out. Reject paths outside $PWD unless --allow-external-out. Reject symlink traversal. Unit tests for ../, absolute, symlink cases.

tasks.title: Codex provider (codex exec OAuth + image copy)
tasks.acceptance: `codex login status` detection for health(). `codex exec` invocation, copy from ~/.codex/generated_images/<session>/ig_*.png to outDir. VendorError classification for not-installed/not-authenticated/timeout/safety/network.

tasks.title: Gemini stream strategy (β)
tasks.acceptance: Invoke `gemini -p --output-format stream-json`. Parse stream for inlineData image parts, decode base64 → Buffer. Handle auth errors, rate-limit (429).

tasks.title: Gemini provider (strategy escalation runner)
tasks.acceptance: Executes mcp→stream→api in order with precheck skip. strategy_attempts recorded as objects {strategy,status,reason?,duration_ms}. Non-retryable errors short-circuit.

tasks.title: Orchestrator generate.ts (vendor selection + parallel dispatch + exit codes)
tasks.acceptance: --vendor auto|codex|gemini|all. auto=best-effort, all=strict. Promise.allSettled for parallel. Exit codes 0,1,2,3,4,5,6 per design §7.

tasks.title: Cost guardrail (cost.ts + confirm prompt)
tasks.acceptance: Estimate from config.cost_guardrail.per_image_usd × n × vendor count. Prompt stdin y/n when ≥ threshold. --yes / OMA_IMAGE_YES bypass. --dry-run always displays estimate.

tasks.title: AbortSignal + SIGINT/SIGTERM propagation
tasks.acceptance: Orchestrator installs process.on('SIGINT') → controller.abort(). Every provider accepts signal and propagates to subprocess spawn/HTTP. Cassette test simulates mid-flight abort.

tasks.title: oma image doctor subcommand
tasks.acceptance: Invokes health() on all registered providers. Outputs per-vendor status + recovery command hint (`codex login`, `gemini auth`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`).

tasks.title: oma image list-vendors subcommand
tasks.acceptance: Lists registered providers with name, enabled flag, default model, supportedModels (from health() cache or static). Tabular output.

tasks.title: SKILL.md + resources (.agents/skills/oma-image/)
tasks.acceptance: SKILL.md matches skeleton in design §11. resources/: execution-protocol.md, vendor-matrix.md, prompt-tips.md, checklist.md. i18n rules honored.

tasks.title: Claude Code skill proxy (.claude/skills/oma-image/)
tasks.acceptance: Thin SKILL.md pointer per oma-search convention: frontmatter + 'Read .agents/skills/oma-image/SKILL.md' delegation.

tasks.title: Gemini MCP strategy (α)
tasks.acceptance: Precheck for mcp-genmedia installation. If present, dispatch via MCP tool call. If absent, return skipped with reason='not-installed'.

tasks.title: Gemini API strategy (γ) via @google/genai
tasks.acceptance: Uses GEMINI_API_KEY env. If unset, return skipped with reason='api-key-required'. Supports nano-banana-2 / gemini-3-pro-image.

tasks.title: Progress heartbeat (5s stderr)
tasks.acceptance: setInterval 5s writes `[oma image] <vendor> generating... <Xs>` to stderr. Cleared on completion or abort.

tasks.title: oma doctor integration (Image vendors: section)
tasks.acceptance: New check registered in cli/commands/doctor/. Invokes oma-image health. Output rendered within oma doctor report.

tasks.title: Orchestrator unit tests
tasks.acceptance: vitest coverage: registry resolution, strategy escalation ordering, partial failure exit codes (6 codes), cost bypass paths, abort propagation.

tasks.title: Provider cassette tests
tasks.acceptance: Fixtures for codex exec stdout + gemini stream-json. Byte-level comparison replaced with SHA256 hash check. No golden image comparison.

tasks.title: i18n message rendering
tasks.acceptance: Reads language from oma-config.yaml. Emits ko/en variants. Technical terms (OAuth, API key, stream-json, MCP) stay English per i18n-guide.

tasks.title: --no-prompt-in-manifest + SHA256 replacement
tasks.acceptance: Flag replaces manifest.prompt with prompt_sha256 hex. Unit test confirms original prompt absent from manifest when flag set.

tasks.title: --format json contract test
tasks.acceptance: Parse stdout JSON from mocked run. Validate against manifest schema + exitCode/manifestPath additions.

tasks.title: CLI smoke test via bun run test
tasks.acceptance: End-to-end --dry-run against mocked providers. Confirms args parsing, cost estimate output, no side effects.

deferred.title: HTML compare report
deferred.reason: separate oma image report <folder> subcommand candidate

deferred.title: --skip-git-repo-check safety audit
deferred.reason: inherit upstream behavior until concrete issue
